zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Condet於1141年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯時，她的父親Robert de Condet Lord of Thorngate35歲，母親Alice De Gernon Countess Of Hertford47歲。她於大約1159年與Lord Hugh Bardolf在英國英格蘭艾可瑟洛可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1186年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾素斯 卡爾頓享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可瑟洛可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Condet于1141年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯时，她的父亲Robert de Condet Lord of Thorngate35岁，母亲Alice De Gernon Countess Of Hertford47岁。她于大约1159年与Lord Hugh Bardolf在英国英格兰艾可瑟洛可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1186年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾素斯 卡爾頓享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可瑟洛可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Condet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Condover (Shropshire), earlier recorded as Conedovre and Conedor'.
English: in northern England perhaps a variant of Connor with intrusive -d-.
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Kanter   or   Ganter  .

variants.name: Condor
meanings: Altered form of Hungarian   Kondor  . This form of the surname is also found in Romania.
Amerindian and Spanish (Cóndor): from cóndor, a word of Quechuan origin, documented in Spain since the 16th century.

variants.name: Connor
meanings: Irish and Manx: shortened form of O'Connor , which is an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Conchobhair ‘descendant of Conchobhar’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Condet was born in 1141, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Condet Lord of Thorngate, was 35 and her mother, Alice De Gernon Countess Of Hertford, was 47. She married Lord Hugh Bardolf about 1159, in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1186, in South Carlton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Condet est née en 1141, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Condet Lord of Thorngate, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice De Gernon Countess Of Hertford, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Hugh Bardolf environ 1159, à Thurrock, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1186, à South Carlton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Thurrock, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Condet 1141 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Condet Lord of Thorngate 35 und ihre Mutter Alice De Gernon Countess Of Hertford 47. Sie hat um 1159 in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom Lord Hugh Bardolf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1186 im Alter von 45 Jahren in South Carlton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Condet è nata il nel 1141 nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Condet Lord of Thorngate, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Alice De Gernon Countess Of Hertford, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Lord Hugh Bardolf circa 1159, nel Thurrock, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1186, nel South Carlton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Thurrock, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Condetが1141年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで生まれた時，父Robert de Condet Lord of Thorngateは35歳，母Alice De Gernon Countess Of Hertfordは47歳であった。約1159年にイギリスイギリスエセックススウロックでLord Hugh Bardolfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1186年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアソウス カールトンで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックススウロックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Condet(이)가 1141년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Condet Lord of Thorngate(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice De Gernon Countess Of Hertford(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 대략 1159년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스록에서 Lord Hugh Bardolf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1186년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 소우스 칼턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스록에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Condet nasceu em 1141, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Condet Lord of Thorngate, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Gernon Countess Of Hertford, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Hugh Bardolf aproximadamente 1159, em Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1186, em South Carlton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Condet родилась в 1141 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Condet Lord of Thorngate было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice De Gernon Countess Of Hertford, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Hugh Bardolf около 1159 г. в местности туррокк, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1186 г. в местности соут карлтон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности туррокк, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Condet nació en 1141, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Condet Lord of Thorngate, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice De Gernon Countess Of Hertford, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Lord Hugh Bardolf aproximadamente 1159, en Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1186, en South Carlton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
